name: DeCordova Bend Estates - DCBE
description: Come play pickleball at DeCordova Bend Estates - DCBE in Granbury, TX! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: First United Methodist Church
description: First United Methodist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Granbury, TX. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Granbury YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Granbury YMCA in Granbury, TX! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Pecan Plantation
description: Come play pickleball at Pecan Plantation in Granbury, TX! There are 7 hard and concrete courts. 4 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights, restrooms, water, and food. Reservations are available.
open_play_schedule: Outdoor play is 7:00 a.m.-10:00 p.m. Monday -Sunday weather permitting. Can reserve court if a resident/member for outdoor court.

name: TX HOP Club
description: Our courts are pro cushioned courts with 5 layers of rubber and 2 layers of acrylic paint.  Much better on your body and much more consistent play.
open_play_schedule: Open play is 2 hours during the week and 3 hours on the weekend
